title: FIFA U-20 World Cup Champion
achievement: Won the FIFA U-20 World Cup.

title: FIFA U-20 Golden Ball & Golden Boot
achievement: Won both the Best Player and Top Scorer awards at the FIFA U-20 World Cup.

title: Olympic Gold Medal
achievement: Won the men's football gold medal at the Beijing Olympics.

title: Historic Sextuple
achievement: Won six major trophies in a single calendar year.

title: First Ballon d'Or
achievement: Won his first Ballon d'Or as the world's best football player.

title: 91 Goals World Record
achievement: Scored a record 91 official goals in one calendar year.

title: FIFA World Cup Golden Ball
achievement: Named the best player of the FIFA World Cup.

title: European Treble
achievement: Won La Liga, Copa del Rey, and the UEFA Champions League.

title: Sixth Ballon d'Or
achievement: Won his sixth Ballon d'Or, setting a new record at the time.

title: Copa América Champion
achievement: Won his first senior international trophy with Argentina.

title: Copa América Golden Ball
achievement: Awarded the Best Player of the Copa América tournament.

title: FIFA World Cup Champion
achievement: Captained Argentina to win the FIFA World Cup.

title: FIFA World Cup Golden Ball
achievement: Won the Golden Ball as the best player of the FIFA World Cup.

title: Eighth Ballon d'Or
achievement: Won a record eighth Ballon d'Or after the World Cup victory.

title: Copa América Champion
achievement: Won his second Copa América title with Argentina.
